name: Mark of Cain
oracleText:
Enchant creature
Enchanted creature gets +2/+0 and has menace.
Whenever enchanted creature is dealt damage, it deals that much damage to each opponent.
flavorText: "Therefore whosoever slayeth Cain, vengeance shall be taken on him sevenfold." — Genesis 4:15
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme reuses the existing Early World Cain artwork to keep the mark and exile imagery visually aligned.
